response.global_analysis: The video consists of Murasaki Shion's dialogue (intro and outro) and a live performance of 'Mage of Violet'. The audio matches the expected lyrics and song structure. I am timing the subtitles strictly to her vocal output, splitting mid-sentence pauses to maintain alignment, and using the song's official lyrics for 'what' while the audio dictates 'when'. The Reference JSON provided the song title and general theme, which I've used for spelling and contextual translation.

subtitles.original: 公式ページのプロフって何だよって
subtitles.english: You might wonder what's on my official profile...

subtitles.original: 人がいっぱいそうだけど
subtitles.english: many people probably do.

subtitles.original: 実はあのプロフィール書いてある人 結構書いてあるから
subtitles.english: But actually, people who write their profiles...

subtitles.original: なんか好きな食べ物とか 誕生日 身長とかの下に
subtitles.english: often list things like favorite foods, birthdays,

subtitles.original: 「夢」っていう欄が実はあるんですよ
subtitles.english: height, and then there's a 'Dream' section.

subtitles.original: ある人とない人がいるかもしれないんだけど
subtitles.english: Some people might have it, and some might not.

subtitles.original: 実はその夢のところに シオンが書いた言葉があるんだけど
subtitles.english: In that 'Dream' section, I wrote something:

subtitles.original: 「世界のみんなを笑顔にする」なんですよね
subtitles.english: "To make everyone in the world smile."

subtitles.original: まあでも 世界のみんなとまではちょっと難しいかもしれないけど
subtitles.english: Well, making everyone in the world smile might be hard...

subtitles.original: せめてシオンのことを好きでいてくれる人には
subtitles.english: but at the very least, for those who love me,

subtitles.original: 絶対笑顔でいてほしいと思ったから
subtitles.english: I definitely want you to keep smiling.

subtitles.original: そんな気持ちで次の曲を歌いたいと思ってます
subtitles.english: With that feeling, I want to sing the next song.

subtitles.original: それでは聞いてください メイジ・オブ・ヴァイオレット
subtitles.english: Please listen: Mage of Violet.

subtitles.original: 暗い方ばっか見てないで
subtitles.english: Don't just look at the dark side.

subtitles.original: ウラッパッパッパ パラリラ踊れよ
subtitles.english: Urappappappa, dance parari!

subtitles.original: 正解が今日を誘導せ
subtitles.english: Let the right answer guide today.

subtitles.original: 華やかなワガママ称えよ
subtitles.english: Celebrate this brilliant selfishness.

subtitles.original: いないいないばあでこっち向いて
subtitles.english: Peek-a-boo! Look over here.

subtitles.original: したたかな未来を咲かせよ
subtitles.english: Let a sturdy future bloom.

subtitles.original: 次第相まって高まって
subtitles.english: Gradually coming together, rising up,

subtitles.original: ダマッタパ和めて黒魔術
subtitles.english: calming down with black magic.

subtitles.original: 聖の呼吸集えよ
subtitles.english: Gather the sacred breath.

subtitles.original: 闇に震え上げるベル
subtitles.english: A bell ringing out in the darkness.

subtitles.original: 切に響く言葉は
subtitles.english: The words that echo earnestly are,

subtitles.original: ブチギレ発狂パラダイス
subtitles.english: a snapping, maddening paradise!

subtitles.original: キラリ心底まで届け
subtitles.english: Let it sparkle and reach deep into your heart.

subtitles.original: これからも私の側で
subtitles.english: From now on, stay by my side.

subtitles.original: 不思議な力撃ち放って
subtitles.english: Unleash this mysterious power,

subtitles.original: 世界も笑顔になっちゃって
subtitles.english: and make the whole world smile!

subtitles.original: ウラパパパラリラ歌えば
subtitles.english: If we sing 'Urapapapararira'...

subtitles.original: 一生一緒ショータイムだよね
subtitles.english: it'll be showtime together forever, right?

subtitles.original: 暗いもの明かしてないで
subtitles.english: Don't just keep things in the dark.

subtitles.original: ダマッタカラダさらば踊れよ
subtitles.english: Say goodbye to a silent body and dance!

subtitles.original: 視界外目逸らさないで
subtitles.english: Don't look away from your peripheral vision.

subtitles.original: 今はただ離れてかないで
subtitles.english: Just for now, don't leave me.

subtitles.original: ヤンヤ舞ってあっち向いて
subtitles.english: Dancing around, look over there.

subtitles.original: 今はまだ心の準備を
subtitles.english: I'm still preparing my heart.

subtitles.original: 期待混じって高まって
subtitles.english: Mixing with expectation, rising up,

subtitles.original: ウラパパパ動け黒魔術
subtitles.english: Urapapapa! Move, black magic!

subtitles.original: 我に続きごよいいよ
subtitles.english: Follow me, it's a good night.

subtitles.original: 闇を破れ熱いよ
subtitles.english: Break through the darkness, it's hot!

subtitles.original: 映れ希望その名は
subtitles.english: Reflect hope; its name is...

subtitles.original: 眠りのハッショパラダイス
subtitles.english: a sleeping paradise!

subtitles.original: キラリ心底まで届け
subtitles.english: Let it sparkle and reach deep into your heart.

subtitles.original: 白黒つけてあげるから
subtitles.english: Because I'll make everything clear for you.

subtitles.original: 不思議な力振りかざして
subtitles.english: Brandishing this mysterious power,

subtitles.original: みんなで笑顔になっちゃって
subtitles.english: let's all smile together!

subtitles.original: ウラパパパラリラ歌えば
subtitles.english: If we sing 'Urapapapararira'...

subtitles.original: 一生一緒かもね
subtitles.english: maybe we'll be together forever.

subtitles.original: キラリキラリと紫に染まって
subtitles.english: Sparkling, sparkling, stained in violet...

subtitles.original: これからもあなたの側で
subtitles.english: from now on, I'll be by your side.

subtitles.original: 奇跡の呪文解き放って
subtitles.english: Unleashing the magic of miracles,

subtitles.original: 咲かせる笑顔の花を
subtitles.english: I'll make the flowers of your smiles bloom.

subtitles.original: キラリ心底まで届け
subtitles.english: Let it sparkle and reach deep into your heart.

subtitles.original: これからも変わらないままで
subtitles.english: Stay just as you are from now on.

subtitles.original: 不思議な力ほら宿して
subtitles.english: Look, harbor this mysterious power,

subtitles.original: 世界も笑顔になっちゃって
subtitles.english: and the world will start to smile!

subtitles.original: ウラパパパラリラ歌えば
subtitles.english: If we sing 'Urapapapararira'...

subtitles.original: 一生一緒ショータイムだよね
subtitles.english: it'll be showtime together forever, right?

subtitles.original: 絶対一緒だよね
subtitles.english: We'll be together forever, for sure.

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで メイジ・オブ・ヴァイオレットでしたー！
subtitles.english: Yes! And that was Mage of Violet!

subtitles.original: 歌う前にもね 話したんだけど
subtitles.english: I mentioned this before the song,

subtitles.original: 「世界のみんなを笑顔にする」ということで
subtitles.english: about making everyone in the world smile...

subtitles.original: 特大魔法を使っちゃいました！
subtitles.english: So I used my ultra-magic!

subtitles.original: 見てましたか？うらー！
subtitles.english: Were you watching? Tada!

subtitles.original: 虹がかかって 晴天です！
subtitles.english: A rainbow has appeared! It's a clear sky!

subtitles.original: みんなが笑顔になってると嬉しいなと思います
subtitles.english: I hope it made everyone smile.

subtitles.original: というわけで 次が最後の曲になるんだけど
subtitles.english: Well, the next song will be the last one...

subtitles.original: その前に こうやってみんなの前で話すのも
subtitles.english: but before that, speaking in front of you all like this...
